lines.english: Lesson 129
lines.raw: Lesson 129 | 第129课

lines.english: Seventy miles an hour
lines.raw: Seventy miles an hour | 时速七十英里

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: What does Ann advise her husband to do next time?
lines.chinese: 安建议她丈夫下次做什么？
lines.raw: What does Ann advise her husband to do next time? | 安建议她丈夫下次做什么？

lines.english: Look, Gary!
lines.raw: Look, Gary! | 瞧，加里！

lines.english: That policeman's waving to you.
lines.raw: That policeman's waving to you. | 那个警察在向你招手。

lines.english: He wants you to stop.
lines.raw: He wants you to stop. | 他要你停车。

lines.english: Where do you think you are?
lines.raw: Where do you think you are? | 你以为你在哪里？

lines.english: On a race track?
lines.raw: On a race track? | 在赛车场上吗？

lines.english: You must have been driving at seventy miles an hour.
lines.chinese: 你刚才一定是以每小时七十英里的速度行驶。
lines.raw: You must have been driving at seventy miles an hour. | 你刚才一定是以每小时七十英里的速度行驶。

lines.english: I can't have been.
lines.raw: I can't have been. | 我不可能开那么快。

lines.english: I was doing eighty when I overtook you.
lines.chinese: 我超过你的时候，我开的是八十。
lines.raw: I was doing eighty when I overtook you. | 我超过你的时候，我开的是八十。

lines.english: Didn't you see the speed limit?
lines.raw: Didn't you see the speed limit? | 你没看到限速标志吗？

lines.english: I'm afraid I didn't, officer.
lines.raw: I'm afraid I didn't, officer. | 恐怕我没有，警官。

lines.english: I must have been dreaming.
lines.raw: I must have been dreaming. | 我当时一定是在做梦。

lines.english: He wasn't dreaming, officer.
lines.raw: He wasn't dreaming, officer. | 他没在做梦，警官。

lines.english: I was telling him to drive slowly.
lines.chinese: 我当时正在叫他慢点开。
lines.raw: I was telling him to drive slowly. | 我当时正在叫他慢点开。

lines.english: That's why I didn't see the sign.
lines.chinese: 那就是我没看到标志的原因。
lines.raw: That's why I didn't see the sign. | 那就是我没看到标志的原因。

lines.english: Let me see your driving licence.
lines.raw: Let me see your driving licence. | 让我看看你的驾照。

lines.english: I won't charge you this time.
lines.raw: I won't charge you this time. | 这次我不罚你。

lines.english: But you'd better not do it again!
lines.raw: But you'd better not do it again! | 但你最好别再犯了！

lines.english: Thank you.
lines.raw: Thank you. | 谢谢你。

lines.english: I'll certainly be more careful.
lines.raw: I'll certainly be more careful. | 我一定会更小心的。

lines.english: I told you to drive slowly, Gary.
lines.raw: I told you to drive slowly, Gary. | 我叫你慢点开的，加里。

lines.english: You always tell me to drive slowly, darling.
lines.chinese: 你总是叫我慢点开，亲爱的。
lines.raw: You always tell me to drive slowly, darling. | 你总是叫我慢点开，亲爱的。

lines.english: Well, next time you'd better take my advice!
lines.chinese: 嗯，下次你最好听我的劝告！
lines.raw: Well, next time you'd better take my advice! | 嗯，下次你最好听我的劝告！
